prompt: An original magazine cover template in the style of a Japanese weekly magazine, featuring a fictional magazine cover, a summer cover model of an adult woman, a bright smile, an outdoor poolside setting, natural and refreshing light, and a glamorous pink ruffled swimsuit. The background includes green bokeh and water surfaces. The layout features a large red magazine name space at the top, a large gold vertical feature block on the right, and a yellow vertical headline space on the far right. It includes multiple black headline bands and inset photo frames with white borders. The layout is organized for easy text insertion later, with a strong commercial magazine composition, high-saturation colors, and a glossy magazine design. High information density but organized for visibility around the face. No real brands, magazine names, or likenesses of real people. A design with the intensity of a Japanese weekly magazine that stands out on convenience store shelves, combining refreshing photography with excessive typography. Commercially strong without being vulgar, balancing facial cuteness with the pressure of text. Include some interesting Japanese characters.
